rewards.description:
Celebrate St. Patrick’s season with St. Paddy’s Lucky Drops! Tune in and watch participating streams to earn exclusive rewards during this limited-time event. 

 📅 Event Dates May 17th – May 21th

 🕛 Starts: 12:00 AM on May 17
 🕚 Ends: 12.00 AM on May 21 UK TIME 🎁

 How to Earn Rewards Watch streams with Drops enabled and unlock rewards based on your watch time: 

 ⏱ 1 Hour – 10K Tickets 
 ⏱ 3 Hours – Shamrock Reward
 ⏱ 6 Hours – Pot of Gold Reward 
 ⏱ 9 Hours – Leprechaun Treasure Reward 

The longer you watch, the more lucky loot you’ll unlock! 🍀  Make sure your account is connected and claim your rewards before the event ends. 

Good luck and may the luck of the Irish be with you! 🌈✨
rewards.name: St. Paddy’s Lucky Drops

timeBasedDrops.name: Get a hang of what's happening

rewards.description:
Let's welcome the brand-new base class "Inventor"!
The brand-new base Class "Inventor" together with the class branches, "Empirica" and "Rhapsodia" are ready now! 
Following the footsteps of a mysterious "mentor," Jodi, bringing her trusty wrench and a mind full of dreams, has arrived at the City of Magitech and is ready to leave her mark on this world!
The "Inventor" excels at inventing Magitech machinery, allowing her to deploy them in battle and destroy enemies from a safe distance. The "Empirica" specializes in long-range combat, and is capable of instantly deploying a variety of armed mechs. The "Rhapsodia" is a mid-range physical DPS with two combat stances, fighting as herself, or by piloting a powerful mecha!
rewards.name: New Class Releasing!

rewards.description: 🎮 Announcing Kakele Online's Epic Twitch Drops!  Embark on a unique journey in Kakele's realm. Dive into mystical lands, conquer quests, and enjoy our exciting Twitch Drops for enhanced gaming. Unlock rewards, including teleports, herbs, potions, and materials.  🕒 Timed Rewards: Enjoy cities Teleports, Ultra potions, Gold Refiner Kits and collect Dog Cards and Trophies.  💰 Prosperity Path: Gain Copper, Tin, Silver, Iron, Gold, Life Herbs, Mana Herbs for success. Accumulate Reputation Coins.  🎈 Grand Finale: End with an exclusive Twitch Drop and Bacon Extravaganza surprise! Link accounts, watch streams, and claim rewards for an unforgettable RPG experience.  🌟 How to Join:  Link Accounts: Connect your account and Twitch in the game app. Watch Streams: Tune in during to your favorite Kakele streamer. Claim Rewards: Receive Twitch Drop notifications claim in the game app.  Influencers: To enable drops on your stream, email us!  Don't miss the chance to enrich your journey with Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: Kakele Online March 2
